title: ET AL. GALLERY - Updated June 2026
content: Et al. is at a new gigantic location right by 24th st Bart. I think it's easy to come into the bookshop in the front and completely miss the giant gallery

title: San Francisco's Underground Bookstores: Et Al. Books
content: Et al.'s Mission location is both art gallery and bookstore, an industrial backdrop to the rich assortment of vintage titles, new fiction, and rare art books.
